data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of reverting to the default pack.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement to revert to the default pack if needed. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or reads that confirm the existence or correctness of the default settings or the ability to revert to them. The linked use case describes the creation of sensible defaults but lacks direct evidence of validation against this specific requirement, indicating a gap in the validation process.
gaps: No evidence of validation for reverting to the default pack.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for reverting to default pack
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure that the system can revert to the default configuration when required.
